data_sources.name: Treasury Auctions
data_sources.desc: Complete auction results including CUSIP, offering amount, awarded amount, bid-to-cover ratio, yield/discount rate, and bidder breakdowns (primary dealer, direct, indirect). Bills use discount rate fields; coupons/bonds use yield fields. The backbone of the panel.
data_sources.fields: cusip, auction_date, issue_date, security_type, bid_to_cover_ratio, total_accepted, primary_dealer_accepted

data_sources.name: Primary Dealer Statistics
data_sources.desc: Weekly aggregate positions and financing of primary dealers in U.S. Treasury securities. Reports total inventory, maturity-bucket breakdowns, repo/reverse-repo financing. Values in millions USD. Repo data suppressed by NY Fed for confidentiality from 2022 onward (forward-filled).

data_sources.name: Investor Class Allotments
data_sources.desc: Per-auction allocation to each investor class: dealers/brokers, investment funds, foreign/international, depository institutions, and others. Published as .xls files with date-stamped filenames. Dollar amounts converted to shares by dividing by total issue amount.

data_sources.name: SOMA Holdings
data_sources.desc: Federal Reserve System Open Market Account holdings by security type. Provides the Fed balance-sheet backdrop: during QE the Fed absorbs supply; during QT dealers must absorb the gap. Lagged one week in the panel to prevent look-ahead bias.
data_sources.fields: bills, notesbonds, tips, frn, total (aggregate par values)

data_sources.name: H.8 Bank Securities
data_sources.desc: Commercial bank Treasury and agency securities holdings from the Federal Reserve H.8 statistical release. Provides the banking sector absorption capacity overlay. Values converted from billions to millions. Lagged one week to prevent look-ahead.
